summary.intent: Build out the Gossamer session monitoring app with AI-generated interaction overviews, Entire CLI checkpoint indexing, checkpoint UI, and integration of checkpoints into the session detail log view.
summary.outcome: All features were implemented end-to-end: InteractionOverview generation on Stop events with backfill, Entire CLI checkpoint indexing (2400 messages across 12 checkpoints), full checkpoint UI (list + detail with summary card), normalized CheckpointSummary table, CheckpointSessionLink many-to-many table, and checkpoint rows interleaved chronologically in SessionDetail.

repo: Gossamer uses Prisma 7 + better-sqlite3 adapter (PrismaBetterSqlite3) with NodeNext module resolution requiring .js extensions on imports
The API server is Express + WebSocket on a shared port; restart required after every TypeScript build to pick up dist/ changes
AI summarization uses claude-haiku-4-5 via Anthropic SDK with a truncateAnalysis fallback when no API key or --no-summary is set
Entire CLI checkpoint branch is entire/checkpoints/v1; files accessed via git worktree add /tmp/... then worktree remove after indexing

Entire CLI full.jsonl event types: user, assistant, progress, file-history-snapshot, system; key fields: uuid, parentUuid, sessionId, timestamp, cwd, gitBranch, type, message/data, planContent, toolUseID, parentToolUseID
Entire CLI session metadata.json summary shape: { intent, outcome, learnings: { repo[], code[{path,finding}], workflow[] }, friction[], open_items[] } — only present in newer CLI versions

code.finding: GFM table detection requires checking header row contains | AND next line matches separator regex /^\|?[\s|:=-]*-+[\s|:=-]*\|?$/; paragraph accumulator must use isTableStart(j) guard not a simple pipe check or any paragraph with | breaks

CheckpointSession.sessionId is @unique (canonical latest record per session), so a separate CheckpointSessionLink table with @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId]) and @@index([sessionId]) is needed to track the full many-to-many history
Use findUnique + conditional create (not upsert with update:{}) for CheckpointMessage to safely skip already-indexed UUIDs without unexpected behavior
Checkpoint rows are interleaved chronologically with events by sorting on createdAt (falling back to indexedAt) and merging into the DisplayItem union type
generateInteractionOverview must be called non-blockingly (no await) on Stop events to avoid delaying the hook response

workflow: Always read the current file state before Edit tool calls on actively-modified files; stale old_string causes edit failures
When adding a new Prisma model, always run prisma db push then npm run build before testing — type errors surface at compile time
git worktree is the clean way to access data from another branch without switching; remove it after use
Re-indexing is safe and idempotent: messages are skipped via findUnique check, sessions and summaries are upserted

friction: Prisma schema Edit tool calls failed multiple times due to stale old_string not matching the already-modified file; required reading file first each time
User rejected first implementation of summary fields as a JSON blob on CheckpointSession; had to redo as normalized CheckpointSummary relation table
Initial GFM table fix used !line.includes('|') in paragraph accumulator which broke all paragraphs containing a pipe character; required a second fix with isTableStart(j)
Port 3000 EADDRINUSE on server restart required lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 before starting the new process

CheckpointSession.sessionId @unique constraint meant re-indexing didn't create duplicate link records — the CheckpointSessionLink backfill silently had no new messages to report, making it hard to verify the upserts actually fired
open_items: The checkpoint rows in SessionDetail navigate to CheckpointDetail but show the full checkpoint — could be scoped to show only the messages from the specific session
CheckpointDetail stats bar and session filtering could be updated to scope to a specific sessionId when navigated from SessionDetail
transcriptLinesAtStart and checkpointTranscriptStart fields on CheckpointSession are always null for current local checkpoints — depends on newer Entire CLI versions
No UI yet for InteractionOverview keywords or the Checkpoints list intent column on sessions that lack summaries (shows — placeholder)
The Checkpoints list fetches summary from the first session only — checkpoints with multiple sessions may show incomplete intent
